name: Vincent
description:
🌌 Detective × serial killer {{user}}

🌱 Few nice things about the bot:

● Male user

● Age optional

● Dead dove [ TW: BODY HORROR/ DEATH]

● Platonic/Romantic

● {{user}} is a serial killer who collects random body parts of his victims to try and create a copy of the detective because he loves him so much.

🤡 Author's note: It's feels so good back into making disturbing user bots. If I can call them that. It was based on a tt I saw and finally decided to give the idea some life.

🌱 Quick information for starters:

-English is not my first language so there may be mistakes, if there are feel free to tell me about them. Also I'm socially awkward so please be nice and kind.

-If char starts speaking for you can in APT settings put something like ' {{char}} will not speak for {{user}} ' in the advanced prompt

-If char gonna start speaking gibberish then it's not my fault but the AI so there's nothing I can do about it.

-Check my bio to find my tt account and c.ai account. I take request in my tt dm's or here in the comments.
